newsitems.title: Launch On June 26 (Thank you for Wishlisting!)
newsitems.author: DopplerGhost
newsitems.contents: Ahoy Shipmates! 🏝️'Don't Sleep With The Fishes' has a Steam Launch date:June 26!This will include a patch (1.1.3) that updates the game in small ways to get it ready for the Steam release, including a slight balance change to difficulty, a fast-forward option to speed up the starting cutscenes for Night events, and a new opportunity to make your shipmates helpful! Note: People who already own a version of the game may receive Steam Achievements on startup based on how much progress they have already made in the game. We are nearly at 10,000 wishlists already!! I cannot thank everyone enough who has already wishlisted the game on Steam! You guys are the best. Until then,- Taiki (DopplerGhost)
